front: What is the concept of broadly neutralizing antibodies (bnAbs) for vaccine design?
back: bnAbs target conserved viral epitopes across strains. Examples: VRC01 (HIV CD4 binding site), CR9114 (influenza HA stem), S309 (SARS-CoV-2 RBD). Germline-targeting immunogen design aims to activate bnAb precursor B cells through sequential immunization.
